name: Cindy Lou
description: Meet Cindy Lou! Cindy Lou came to us in tough shape - she was so emaciated you could see all of her bones, and she definitely needed some extra love. After lots of care and attention from our team, she is now thriving! She has been nothing but a sweetheart since coming into our care, always wanting pets and snuggles from the staff. Cindy Lou will keep herself entertained by playing with toys when she's alone, but when you are around she just wants to be by your side. Cindy Lou will likely need some patience as she adjusts to her new home environment, but she's so worth it! She does still get super excited when we feed her so she'll likely need some extra structure around her feeding schedule. She will also need to work on some basic training as we believe she has not had much up to this point. Overall we believe Cindy Lou will make an excellent companion for someone willing to love her endlessly!

name: Tucker
description: Meet Tucker! Tucker is a handsome man, who came to us in search of his new furever home! This sweet, gentle guy is currently on a health and happiness journey, working hard to trade extra pounds for extra walks, extra tail wags, and extra years with his future family. Tucker loves people, attention, and of course snacks! He is happiest hanging out with his favourite humans, whether that is going for a stroll, playing fetch, or lounging on the couch. Tucker is ready for his furever home, with a family that will help keep his weight-loss journey on track!

name: Mater
description: Meet Mater! Mater is a handsome boy who recently came to us in search of his furever home. He is an energetic guy who enjoys playing with squeaky toys and exploring the backyard! Mater is working on his leash manners, but he is very smart and willing to learn. With lots of treats and patience, we know Mater will make someone the best companion!

name: Charlotte
description: Meet Charlotte! Charlotte is a cute little pup who is searching for her furever home. She's friendly, adorable, and would love to be your new best friend. She will need help with basic training as she's just a young girl.

name: Robin
description: Meet Robin! Robin is a cute little pup who is searching for her furever home. She's friendly, adorable, and would love to be your new best friend. She will need help with basic training as she's just a young girl.

name: Porkchop
description: Meet Porkchop! Porkchop is a very lovable boy, who recently came to us in search of his furever home! Chop loves loves all kinds of toys, and is very treat motivated. He is a super smart boy, who already know some commands like sit, shake, and down. Porkchop could use a little bit of work on his leash manners, as he doesn't seem like he has a lot of time on leash, but this super smart boy will catch on very quickly! He is also a professional snuggle bug, and would love a comfy spot to curl up next to you!

name: Everglade
description: Meet Everglade! This little floofer came to us to find her furever home! She is a sweet girl that loves people, she likes to give gentle kisses and get lots of pets. She is still just a puppy so she will need help with basic training and potty training, but this is normal for a puppy! If you would like to meet sweet Everglade, please send in an application!

name: Yosemite
description: Meet Yosemite! Yosemite came to us to find his furever home! This fluffy guy has the biggest heart, he wants to be by your side getting all the love and attention! He is still very young and needs to be potty trained along with help learning basic commands, but he is well worth it!

name: Yellowstone
description: Meet Yellowstone! Yellowstone came to us to find his furever home and he is so ready to find it! This sweet and gentle boy is still a bit timid and may need some help building his confidence! He likes people, attention, and pets and would make a great addition to any family! Yellowstone is still just a puppy, so he will need to be potty trained and some basic training as well.

name: Kylo
description: Meet Kylo! Kylo is a handsome guy who came to us in search of his furever home! He is a super playful, energetic guy who really enjoys his time outside in the yard, exploring. Kylo walks pretty well on a leash, but can pull at times. This guy is an 'in your pocket' type dog, and loves leaning into your legs for butt scratches. He is good with other dogs, and has lived with cats before. Kylo needs to go to a home without young children.

name: Dozer
description: Meet Dozer! Dozer is a chunky, handsome little man who came to us in search of his furever home! He is a super playful, smart and energetic guy who would love to be the new addition to your family! Dozer will need some help with basic training, as he is still just a baby, but we know he is super smart and will learn quickly!

name: Libby
description: Meet Libby! Libby is a beautiful little girl, who recently came to us in search of her furever home! Libby is super smart, and already knows her 'sit' and 'down' command. We are currently working on 'shake' with her and she is catching on very quickly. Since Libby is still a young baby, she may need a little help with house training but we know it won't take her long!

name: Charm
description: Meet Charm! Charm is a cute, playful little girl who came to us in search of her furever home! She loves to be around people, and getting attention and scratches. Charm will need some help with basic training, as she is still just a baby. We know that she will be a quick learner!

name: TaTonka
description: Meet TaTonka! Tonka is a super handsome boy, who came to us in search of his furever home! Tonka is a very playful boy, who loves zooming around the yard, as fast as he can. He enjoys playing fetch, and tug-of-war. Tonka would benefit from a family who will spend a lot of time, playing, and helping him get his energy out! Tonka also loves going for walks, but can use a little bit of work on his leash manners.

name: Lady
description: Meet Lady! Lady is a super sweet, little girl who recently came to us, in search of her furever home! This sweetheart will do anything for belly rubs, and loves attention from everyone! She has lots of playful puppy energy, and would love to be the new member of your family. Lady is a little nervous in the shelter environment, and would benefit from a family willing to give her the love, attention and consistency she needs. Lady can't wait to meet you!

name: Mizuki
description: Meet Mizuki! This handsome fella recently came into us to find his furever home! Mizuki of course LOVES playing in the snow, and spending as much time as possible, outside. He is an energetic guy who would enjoy being taken for walks, and enjoying the snow while it's still here! He loves a comfy place to snuggle up, so after some time outside we think he would be a wonderful movie watching companion.

name: Reba McEntire
description: Meet Reba McEntire! Reba is a sweet and adorable pup who is searching for her furever home. She is playful and friendly, she loves people but also loves all sorts of toys. She will need some help with training as she's just a young pup, but she is very treat-motivated so we know she can learn quickly with a bit of consistency (and some snacks)!

name: Willie Nelson
description: Meet Willie Nelson! Willie is a sweet and adorable pup who is searching for his furever home. He is playful and friendly, he loves people but also loves all sorts of toys. He will need some help with training as he's just a young pup, but he is very treat-motivated so we know he can learn quickly with a bit of consistency (and some snacks)!

name: Snoop Dawg
description: Meet Snoop Dawg! Snoopy is a handsome, energetic boy who came to us in search of his furever home. He is a good combination of friendly and playful - he is very lovey, but also has lots of energy to get out. Snoop Dawg loves playing outside, whether he's zooming through the snow or playing fetch (although he does sometimes take some convincing to drop the ball once he's caught it). Snoopy walks pretty well on a leash, except for when he jumps up like a kangaroo in an attempt to give you kisses! Snoop Dawg would benefit from a home where he can get out all of his energy and have enough mental stimulation. Snoop Dawg believes in peace, love, and plenty of belly rubs. If you're looking for a loyal companion who's ready to roll into your life and make it a little more fun, Snoop Dawg is your guy!

name: Axel
description: Meet Axel! Axel is a very handsome gentleman who came to us as a stray in search of his furever home! Axel enjoys going for short walks with his human and snuggling up after on a nice comfy bed. Axel is very treat motivated, and he will also do anything for your love and attention. This boy has a little bit of soreness in his hind end, he is currently on glucosamine which is helping with his pain. Axel would love a comfy place to land! His fosters say: "I may be 9 but I come with a lot of experience. I still like to trot around outside and climb snow banks and I love to play fetch. I'm very loving. I like to lay at my human's feet with either my paw or my head touching. I enjoy long walks and short trips outside and I make a great partner in any relationship because I like to listen."

name: Marvin
description: Meet Marvin! Marvin is a sweet, handsome little guy in search of his furever home. We were able to place him into foster care and his fosters have really helped him with his training - he doesn't have any accidents in the house, and he has learned "Sit" and "Shake" already! He enjoys playing with toys, and is also very treat motivated (which definitely helps with training). He is also good with other dogs and would be fine with children.

name: Timber
description: Meet Timber! This beautiful girl was found outside and came to us to find her furever home! She's got the prettiest coat with the sweetest personality to match! She loves to get pets and scritches and really likes people! You would be so lucky to have Timber join your family!

name: Luna & Rose
description: Meet Luna and Rose! These two cuties came to us to find their furever home! Luna and Rose are laid back girls that really just enjoy a cozy spot to curl up in. You can often find them cuddled up together in a comfy bed! Along with napping, these two also like to eat treats and get gentle pets and scritches. They are sweethearts that would enjoy a calm home to go to together.

name: Smithers
description: Meet Smithers! This handsome guy came to us to find his soft place to land. He is a sweet kitty with calm and gentle energy! He may be 11, but he still has lots of love to give. Smithers would love to be your couch-buddy, or to spend his days relaxing in a cozy spot.

name: Ringo
description: Meet Ringo! Ringo was found outside and brought to us to find his furever home! He has the most gorgeous orange eyes that complement his beautiful coat. Ringo is a sucker for some love and attention, when he sees you he will roll around all over the floor to get pets and scritches everywhere! Ringo would make a great addition to any home, if you would like to meet this handsome boy please send in an application!

name: Rory
description: Meet Rory! Rory came to us to find her furever home! At first, she was scared but has quickly warmed up and shown us her super sweet personality. Rory always welcomes pets and scritches, she will even just sit in your arms when you hold her. Her favourite spot to curl up for a nap is your lap! She hasn't been the biggest fan of the other cats here in the shelter, she would likely do best in a home as the only cat! If you would like to add a sweetheart to your family, please apply to meet Rory!

name: Rusty
description: Meet Rusty! Rusty is a sweet boy that came to us to find his furever home! He is a little lovebug that adores attention and scritches, he will roll around and even enjoys gentle belly rubs. He could no longer stay in his previous home as he played rough with the other cats, he would do best in a home on his own or with cats of a similar size (he is a big boy)! He likes to have conversations with you and will often meow back when you talk to him!

name: Snowball
description: Meet Snowball! Snowball came to us as his owner could no longer care for him and he is now searching for his new furever home! He is a very friendly guy that will jump up in the air to get his head pats. He does have some interest in toys and playing, but he really likes people and just wants to be around you! He will occasionally let out a little raspy meow to get your attention!

name: Bobby
description: Meet Bobby! Bobby is searching for his new furever home as his previous owner was no longer able to care for him. He did live with another cat in his previous home, so he would likely do well with another friendly cat in the home. Bobby can be a bit shy at first, but once he is more comfortable he loves to be around people. He adores affection and will let you pet him all day! He has big cheeks but he is just a small guy, he would love to find a loving home soon!

name: Shaggy
description: Meet Shaggy! Shaggy came to us to find his furever home! He has spent time with Fred while at the shelter, and we think the two would do well in a home together, although Shaggy could also do well on his own or with another friendly cat in the home. Shaggy does like to play with toys and likes to receive gentle pets! When he gets attention he will start purring! This beautiful boy would make a great addition to any home!

name: Fred
description: Meet Fred! This dashing gentleman came to us to find his furever home! Fred gets along well with Shaggy and they would love to go home together, but Fred would also do well on his own or with another friendly cat in the home. Fred has lots of interest in toys and also people, he just wants to be around you whether that's playing or giving him pets and scritches. Fred will wiggle his way into your heart if you give him the chance!

name: Ribbon
description: Meet Ribbon! Ribbon came to us as a stray and is looking for her warm and cozy furever home! She is a curious girl, she's always ready to explore new environments and check everything out! She does have some interest in playing, but her priority is getting affection. Ribbon has a beautiful and silky coat with a cute little white tuft on her chest! She is ready to find a family to call her own!

name: Glottis
description: Meet Glottis! Glottis is a handsome cat searching for his furever home! Glottis has a chill vibe overall, he likes to spend his time lounging around and napping, he would make a great buddy to curl up with and watch some movies. If you provide him with a cat tree with a cozy napping spot he will be the happiest boy in the world. He would prefer a quieter environment to match his energy, but he could also thrive in a busier home if it's the right match for him!

name: Skiddles
description: Meet Skiddles! Skiddles came to us as her owners could no longer care for her, so she is now searching for her new furever home. Skiddles is the sweetest girl - she really likes people! She just wants to get some pets and scritches. She will let you know how greatful she is by letting out her happy meows! She likes to spend her time curled up in the coziest of spaces, she adores a little cubby hole to sleep in and if she can't find a spot cozy enough she will burrow under her blankets and make herself a spot.

name: Jetta
description: Meet Jetta! Jetta is a sweet and handsome guy who was found outside as a scared kitty. We could tell he wanted to be sweet but was just afraid in the shelter environment, so we sent him into foster care for some extra love! Now he's ready to be your new best friend. His fosters say he's a talkative guy with a big purr-motor that matches his name. He also has huge, polydactyl paws! He is showing all the makings of being the best cuddle-buddy, he absolutely loves belly rubs. He'll do best with a kitty companion to help keep him company and also show him the ropes.

name: Aspen
description: Meet Aspen! Aspen is a super sweet girl who came to us along with her kittens. We sent the whole group into foster care, and now they are all ready for their furever homes. Aspen is a friendly girl who enjoys getting pets and scritches! She loves a cozy spot to curl up and seems like she'd be a great couch-buddy. She does well with other cats, or can be the star of the show.

name: Missy
description: Meet Missy! Missy came to us after a rough start to life, but she is ready to find her furever home! One of her favourite past times is to torpedo herself in her blankets, she loves to curl up under them and make herself cozy. She really likes pets and scritches and will lean into you to get more! Missy does best on a sensitive digestion diet as she can get stomach aches on other foods. She has lived with other cats in the past, so it is possible for her to live with another one if given the proper introduction. Missy is so ready to find her soft place to land!

name: John & Arthur
description: Meet John and Arthur! These two cuties came to us as scared kittens, and we sent them into foster care where they could get some extra love and attention. After lots of patience and care from their fosters, they are ready to be your new best friends. They do rely on each other for comfort, so we're searching for a home where they can stay together - and they qualify for our bonded pairs pricing! John is a handsome kitty who loves attention and cuddles. Arthur is the fluffiest kitty with a goofy personality! These two are going to be the purrfect addition to the right home.

name: Rainbow Dash
description: Meet Rainbow Dash! Rainbow Dash came to us to find her furever home! She has a lot of energy, Rainbow Dash loves to play with all sorts of toys (especially ones with catnip) and get all the attention. If you walk by and do not say hi to her, she will meow at you to let you know that is not acceptable. She likes to lounge on the cat tree or a comfy bed, most of all she wants to be the centre of attention!

name: Rosalina
description: Meet Rosalina! Rosalina came into our care while pregnant and now that all of her kittens have been adopted she herself is looking for her forever home! When Rosalina came into our care she was timid and not use to being in a home environment. We placed Rosalina in a foster home to raise her babies and become use to human interaction and we are so happy to say that her foster family has seen incredible progress in her socialization. Rosalina loves to snuggle with her people, she will curl up in a little ball and purr away while she gets her pets. She lives with other cats in her home and gets along with them well. Rosalina is sometimes unsure about being picked up so we would recommend a home without young children.

name: Mike
description: Meet Mike! Mike came into our care as his owner sadly could no longer care for him. He'd love to find his happy furever! He was nervous at first in the shelter environment, but with some love and patience he has warmed right up! He now loves to get butt scratches and all the love from our team and volunteers. Mike lived with another cat in his previous home, so with a proper introduction he would likely do well with a kitty friend. He will probably need some time to adjust to a his new home, so he will need an adopter who is willing to give him the patience and love he needs so that he can settle in at his pace. Once he is feeling comfortable, we know he will make a super loving best friend!

name: Joan
description: Meet Joan! Joan is a beautiful yellow canary searching for their furever home! If you would like to meet Joan, please send in an application!
